name: blog-chart
description: > Generate dark-mode-compatible inline SVG data visualization charts for blog posts. Supports horizontal bar, grouped bar, donut, line, lollipop, area, and radar charts with automatic platform detection (HTML vs JSX/MDX). Enforces chart type diversity, accessible markup (role=img, aria-label), source attribution, and transparent backgrounds. Use whenever the user mentions data visualization, charts, graphs, comparison tables that need to be visualized, or wants to embed inline SVG visualizations
author: AgriciDaniel
